kits.name: testkit
kits.description: Test design, planning, coverage, and analysis agents

kits.name: multikit
kits.description: Meta-kit for generating, improving, registering, and validating multikit agents and prompts

kits.name: cikit
kits.description: CI/CD pipeline automation — versioning governance, change analysis, version management, and CI check workflows (Copilot CLI / Ralph Wiggum)

kits.name: dockit
kits.description: Documentation governance, generation, and analysis — README and project docs (guides, API reference, architecture docs)

kits.name: refactorkit
kits.description: Code quality diagnosis and remediation — unified diagnosis (lint, deprecation, logic, warnings, coverage, leakage) and unified fix with selective keyword support

kits.name: promptkit
kits.description: Prompt design, analysis, and optimization agents — Self-Distillation based Prompt Optimization (SDPO) support

kits.name: structkit
kits.description: Project structure governance, architecture analysis, and enforcement — directory roles, naming conventions, deployment patterns, architecture patterns, design recommendations, and CI validation
